message:
chore(gitignore): ignore full .claude/ dir, not just settings.local.json

Broaden the existing rule so the whole Claude Code local-state directory is
ignored instead of only settings.local.json. The dir also holds per-machine
scheduler state (scheduled_tasks.lock from the /loop + CronCreate workflow)
and can accumulate other machine-local caches — none of which are
authoritative and none of which should be committed.

Before:  .claude/settings.local.json
After:   .claude/

Nothing inside .claude/ is tracked today, so this is a pure broadening of
the existing intent with no file-removal side effect.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -128,8 +128,8 @@ verify_*.sh
 newfile.txt
 repro_*.rs
 
-# Claude local settings
-.claude/settings.local.json
+# Claude local settings (entire dir — scheduled_tasks.lock etc. are machine-local state)
+.claude/
 
 # FastEmbed model caches
 .fastembed_cache/
